items.title: Oppo K15 Launch Date Confirmed; Key Specifications Revealed Ahead of Debut
items.summary: Oppo K15 will be launched in China on July 24 at 10:00 am local time (7:30 am IST), the company has confirmed. The upcoming smartphone will arrive as the third model in the line...

items.title: The Group Behind ‘2000 Mules’ Is Back With Another Election Conspiracy Film
items.summary: True the Vote is working with a Detroit pastor to produce a new documentary called Trap, based on claims that have already been thrown out in court.

items.title: Verizon Fios boosts its fastest plan to 5Gbps
items.summary: Verizon Fios just introduced a new 5Gbps home plan that's more than twice as fast as its previous flagship 2Gbps plan.
